content.en:
Gu Heng Domain Ancestor has made a move, and today is his battle for fame.

He didn't believe that he had broken the shackles of the Invincible Domain Ancestor, and had transformed the Invincible Domain Body three times, and he was not the opponent of the Five Thunder Domain Ancestors!

"Shake the Ancient Fist!"

Gu Heng Domain Ancestor punched the Five Thunder Domain Ancestor, and the entire Void Domain was shaken, and he kept trembling.

If it is an ordinary one-step invincible domain ancestor, if it is a hard punch, I am afraid that it will be blown up.

However, at this moment, a thunder spear appeared in the hands of the Five Thunder Domain Ancestors, and this thunder spear was not a real weapon, but a condensation of some kind of power.

"Holy Technique, no, it surpasses the Holy Technique, it's the Ancestral Technique!"

Ye Tian recognized it.

He had seen the Fire Pattern Battle Ancestor of the Peerless Domain before, and the Fire Pattern Battle Ancestor had performed the Ancestral Technique, so he recognized the aura fluctuations of the Ancestral Technique.

This move performed by the Five Thunder Domain Ancestors contained the breath of an ancestral skill, and it was obviously an ancestral skill.

I saw that the Five Thunder Domain Ancestors stabbed fiercely with the thunder spear in their hands, and in an instant, they burst through the Ancient Heng Domain Ancestor's holy technique Shaking Ancient Fist, and one blow broke the defense of the Ancient Heng Domain Ancestor, directly penetrating the invincible domain body of the Ancient Heng Domain Ancestor who had transformed three times.

Puff puff!!!

Gu Heng Domain Ancestor vomited blood, and quickly retreated, his face extremely shocked.

"You, you have comprehended an ancestral skill, how is this possible?"

The Ancient Hengyu Ancestor was incredulous.

The other Domain Ancestors were also extremely surprised, as if all this was too abnormal.

How many Superior Domain Ancestors have not comprehended an ancestral skill, why did the Five Thunder Domain Ancestors comprehend the ancestral technique?

The Invincible Domain Ancestor wants to practice an ancestral skill, this is too difficult!

This is even more difficult than hitting the Peerless Domain Ancestor!

Gu Heng Domain Ancestor broke the shackles of the invincible domain ancestor, and he will inevitably become a superior domain ancestor in the future, which is already very awesome, and the Five Thunder Domain Ancestor is even more awesome, and he has practiced an ancestral skill with the body of the invincible domain ancestor, how against the sky!

"This is the Five Thunder Domain Ancestor's Five Thunder Holy Spear, this was originally a holy skill, it seems that the Five Thunder Domain Ancestor not only broke the limit of the Holy Body, but also had a trace of the characteristics of the Ancestral Body, but also broke the limit of the Holy Skill and advanced it to the level of the Ancestral Technique!"

I have to say that he admires the Five Thunder Domain Ancestor very much, at least he can't do this.

The strength of the Five Thunder Domain Ancestors, who possessed an ancestral skill, had already broken the limit of one step of invincible domain ancestors, and their combat power was even comparable to that of the weaker peerless domain ancestors.

Gu Heng Domain Ancestor was naturally not the opponent of the Five Thunder Domain Ancestor, if he really fought desperately, he was afraid that he would be directly killed by him.

"I throw in the towel!"

Gu Heng Domain Ancestor said helplessly.

As the Gu Heng Domain Ancestor admitted defeat, the other invincible Domain Ancestors did not dare to fight against the Five Thunder Domain Ancestors.

The Dark Sanctuary definitely had an invincible Domain Ancestor that could rival the Five Thunder Domain Ancestors, but there was none here.

"The Five Thunder Domain Ancestors have won!"

Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief.

At this moment, this group of invincible domain ancestors has no way to persecute the human race, and there is no way to forcibly seize the place of the holy monument.

"Thank you, Five Thunder Domain Ancestors!" Ye Tian thanked.

"Where is the duty!"

The Five Thunder Domain Ancestor said lightly.

The invincible domain ancestors of the major forces did not dare to make a second, and those supreme domain ancestors wanted the number of holy monuments, so they could only buy them.

As a result, the Supreme Domain Ancestor of the Holy Gate had almost exhausted all his belongings, and even needed to borrow some resources and treasures from the Invincible Domain Ancestor before he could barely buy a Holy Monument quota.

It can be said that Ye Tian has made a lot of money this time!

Because Ye Tianding's price was too high, many Supreme Domain Ancestors were unwilling to buy it, so they could only choose to give up.

In the end, Ye Tian found that there were still a lot of places among the 1,000 holy monuments, and he allocated some places to the Battle Gate, and gave them to several invincible domain ancestors of the Battle Gate, and let them distribute them by themselves, which could be regarded as a return to them.

For the remaining Holy Monument quota, Ye Tian gave the Terran a newly selected group of domain ancestors.

In this way, all the places in the monument have been allocated.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian entered a holy tablet world of his choice and began to refine the world core.

It didn't take long for the world core to be refined.

"Close the entrance to the world!"

Ye Tian's heart moved, and the entrance to the world was closed, so that people from the outside world would not be able to enter, unless it was to break the holy monument.

However, no matter how strong the Holy Monument is, unless it has the power to break the Xuanxu Holy Realm, it will not be able to break the Holy Monument at all.

An invincible domain ancestor like the Five Thunder Domain Ancestors had the hope of breaking the Holy Monument, and the other Invincible Domain Ancestors almost couldn't do it.

Therefore, the retreat here is very safe and there is no need to worry about being disturbed.

-------------------

The Holy Monument World was like a starry sky, and Ye Tian sat here cross-legged and began to cultivate.

Wisps of starlight fell into Ye Tian's soul, helping Ye Tian's soul refine the soul holy light.

This starlight is naturally not the real starlight, but the power of the holy monument, which helps to refine the soul holy light.

"The cultivation speed is so fast!"

Ye Tian was overjoyed.

Immediately, he ran the Endless Domain Method, frantically refining his soul, and constantly giving birth to soul holy light.

And here, too, the perception will be greatly increased.

"No wonder everyone wants to enter the Holy Monument World, there are too many benefits to cultivating here, even if a third-grade Supreme Domain Ancestor comes in to cultivate, he can eventually become a first-grade Invincible Domain Ancestor!" Ye Tian muttered.

Day after day passed, Ye Tian's soul holy light continued to be born, and the number became more and more.

At the beginning, Ye Tian's entire soul only had a little soul holy light, but now the soul holy light gradually covered the surface of the soul, and it already occupied a certain proportion.

In the blink of an eye, 30 million years have passed.

After such a long period of penance, Ye Tian's soul holy light rose greatly.

"Soul Light that covers one-fifth of souls!"

Ye Tian looked at the soul sea, the soul holy light that covered one-fifth of the soul, and was immediately very satisfied.

It can be said that this cultivation of his soul holy light has increased tenfold.

Before, when he himself did not use the Holy Monument World to cultivate, after 100 million years of penance, he barely increased the total amount of the original soul holy light by thirty percent, but now it is ten times, which shows how good the effect of the Holy Monument World is.

One-fifth of the soul's soul holy light is equivalent to two percent of the soul holy light, and his two-percent soul holy light is probably stronger than the holy soul of the ordinary Supreme Domain Ancestor, after all, his soul is too powerful.

It's a pity that when he cultivates to this level, it will be difficult for the soul holy light to grow, because the increase in the holy tablet world has a very average effect on him.

In terms of strength, Ye Tian's current strength is much stronger than in the past, after all, the soul holy light has risen greatly, and his strength has naturally skyrocketed.

"Only one Holy Monument World can make my soul Holy Light grow to two percent, at this rate, it will be more and more difficult to refine later, I am afraid that it will take seven or eight Holy Tablet Worlds, or even more Holy Tablet Worlds, to completely transform my soul into a Holy Soul!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Moreover, the same Monument can only have an effect once, for example, if he goes to other Monument Worlds of this Monument now, it is useless, in fact, the 1,000 Monument Worlds of this Monument are actually the same.

"There are very few holy monuments in the Dark Sacred Domain, and many of the places in the Holy Monument World have long been used up, with my place, at most obtaining a Holy Monument World quota in the Battle Gate is the limit, if you want to use the Holy Monument to condense the Holy Soul, it is estimated that it is an extravagant hope!"

Ye Tian shook his head and said.

Therefore, he must use other opportunities to be able to condense the Holy Soul!
